name: Zhu Zan
page_title: Zhu Zan 朱讚 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: A countryman of Cao Zhen, he died early and Cao Zhen argued for his son to be given a fief.

full_text:
Zhu Zan 朱讚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Zan (朱讚)was born in Pei. Officer of Cao Zhen, sent to raid the Shu camp but failed. Killed by Zhao Yun. Zhu Zan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
